expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: In result.md the case focus is explicitly addressed: it states the benchmark expectation that “historical analogs become required-before-ship gates during Phase 5b” and specifically references enforcing explicit “[ANALOG-GATE]” entries in the “release recommendation” as “required-before-ship gates.” It also quotes the phase5b rubric language: “Historical analogs that remain relevant must be rendered as explicit [ANALOG-GATE] entries...”

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The produced outputs consistently frame the evaluation as phase5b: result.md says “Primary phase under test: phase5b (shipment-checkpoint review)” and the analysis is organized around phase5b artifacts (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, phase5b draft) and phase5b rubric requirements from review-rubric-phase5b.md.
